title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
summary: The Pragmatic Programmer cuts through the increasing specialization and technicalities of modern software development to examine the core process taking a requirement and producing working, maintainable code that delights its users.

title: Re: dan Perempuan
author: Maman Suherman
summary: Re is a woman who works as a commercial sex worker, or more precisely, a lesbian sex worker. Re was forced to become a sex worker to pay off her debt to Mami Lani.

title: On Children
author: Wu Xiaole
summary: Being a tutor gives Wu Xiaole the opportunity to observe her students' families; how parents raise, educate, and love their children.

title: Thinking in Systems
author: Donella Meadows
summary: A primer on understanding and working with complex systems in various domains.
keyTakeaways: Strange loops and self-reference are fundamental to consciousness
Connections between formal systems, art, and human thought
The relationship between meaning and form

title: Attention Is All You Need
author: Vaswani et al.
summary: The paper that introduced the Transformer architecture, revolutionizing natural language processing.
keyTakeaways: Self-attention mechanism eliminates need for recurrence
